reviews.comment:
Los baños dan asco. El cafe carisimo.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are disgusting. The coffee is ridiculously expensive.

reviews.comment:
Tardas 1 hora en cargar nafta porque solo dejan un playero para todo el pueblo. Igual recomiendan mucho cargar acá en vez de fiambalá

(Translated by Google)
It takes an hour to get gas because they only have one attendant for the whole town. They highly recommend filling up here instead of in Fiambalá.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqcDRxZTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.
Recomendación pongan más playeros ya que demoramos 45 minutos en cargar nafta por la cantidad de gente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service.
I recommend hiring more attendants, as it took us 45 minutes to fill up our tanks due to the number of people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqN0lfX25nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención tanto de los playeros como en el shop.
Tener paciencia ya que siempre hay mucha demanda de combustibles y se demora un poco la carga.

(Translated by Google)
Good service from both the attendants and the shop.
Please be patient as there is always high demand for fuel and filling up can take a little while.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqalBmMFl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Increiblemente lentos. Mientras un empelado no da a basto los demas boludeando.

(Translated by Google)
Incredibly slow. While one employee is overwhelmed, the others are just goofing off.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREdDZiRmpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La YPF del terror... Tenía 4 autos delante y tarde más de una hora en poder cargar combustible. Todos los vehículos llevan bidones y las camionetas llevan los tachos gigantes de aceite y les llenan todo antes de entender a los que solo queremos combustible para un vehículo. Una vergüenza. Si la pueden evitar mejor.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF station is a nightmare... There were four cars ahead of me and it took over an hour to get fuel. All the vehicles carry jerrycans, and the trucks carry giant oil drums, and they fill them up completely before understanding those of us who just want fuel for one vehicle. It's a disgrace. Avoid it if you can.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREcllXSmpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Más de una hora de demora para cargar combustible, tienen pocos surtidores y lo peor de todo, la gente baja de camionetas y autos con tambores y bidones, así que los que solo tenemos que cargar combustible en nuestro auto tenemos que esperar que carguen litros y litros en esos tambores y bidones que la gente lleva. Una falta de respeto que permitan hacer eso. Deberían poner días y horarios para que se hagan esas cosas.

(Translated by Google)
Over an hour's wait to get fuel. They have too few pumps, and worst of all, people are getting out of trucks and cars with drums and jerrycans, so those of us who just need to fill up our cars have to wait while they fill up liters and liters of those drums and jerrycans that people are carrying. It's disrespectful that they allow this. They should set specific days and times for this to happen.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREaGViOFBnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena estacion de servicios, muy concurrida, algo lento el despacho, punto a mejorar

(Translated by Google)
Good service station, very busy, somewhat slow service, room for improvement
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURELWVHVTd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una clavada. Se demora mucho. Una ciudad pujante y con una estacion de pueblo fantasma.

(Translated by Google)
A rip-off. It takes forever. A thriving city with a ghost town train station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREc2FiVExnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, tanto en surtidores como en el shop. Medialunas recién preparadas a partir de las 07:30. Tengan en cuenta que casi siempre hay cola para cargar .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, both at the pumps and in the shop. Freshly baked croissants are available from 7:30 AM. Keep in mind that there's almost always a queue to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREaXRlVnRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
No aceptan pago con aplicaciones. Solo tarjeta, transferencia o efectivo.

(Translated by Google)
They do not accept payments via apps. Only card, bank transfer, or cash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREaXI3TXZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No tiene surtidor compartido con todos los combustible que venden.

(Translated by Google)
It does not have a shared pump for all the fuels they sell.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREc3Jta3dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena la atención pero hacen falta más surtidores en días feriados de vacaciones se colapsa

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, but more pumps are needed; it gets overwhelmed on holidays.
